headline: ConnecToledo lands $120K multi-year grant for free music series
paragraphs: ConnecToledo will run a free outdoor music series at Promenade Park, Glass City Metropark, Junction Park, and Danny Thomas Park through 2026, 2027, and 2028.
why_it_matters: A three-year programming commitment with venues spanning Junction through downtown is the soft infrastructure that builds cross-neighborhood foot traffic patterns.
search_terms: ConnecToledo music series grant Promenade Park Glass City Junction Park Danny Thomas
